notes: After proton 3.16-7 the game works almost perfect. The joystick now works fine but there's a small delay betwen the button press and the action in game. Also my xbox one controller is identified as a generic control. But the game is perfectly playable now.
title: TEMBO THE BADASS ELEPHANT

notes: The game works with perfect sound and graphics. But the joystick (xbox one) is recognized as a generic one and there's a huge input lag delay betwen the button press and the action. It seems that the problem got worse since the last proton update.
title: TEMBO THE BADASS ELEPHANT
